Advanced detoxification through bio-frequencies

We carry out an advanced medical detoxification process, using state-of-the-art bio-frequencies, designed to help you eliminate harmful substances and revitalize your body effectively.

We Identify and Treat Countless Types of Toxins

We use advanced bio-frequency technology that has proven its high efficacy in other medical treatments that I offer in the clinic. This system detects the energetic 'signatures' (frequencies) of specific toxins present in your body. Using a specialized device, we apply inverse electromagnetic frequencies that neutralize toxic information at the cellular level. This helps your body eliminate those harmful substances more efficiently and restore its natural function without overloads, in a non-invasive way.

🌍

Environmental Toxins

Paints, solvents, asbestos, pesticides, pollens, preservatives, fuels, mold, air, water and food pollutants, etc...

🏠

Domestic Toxins

Compounds in cosmetics, ointments, emulsions, natural fabrics, textile dyes and detergents etc...

💊

Medical Toxins

Drug residues, malaria prophylaxis and poisons. Sequelae of childhood diseases etc...

🔗

Heavy Metals

Lead, mercury, cadmium, dental amalgams, arsenic, beryllium, palladium, nickel/chromium etc...

🦠

Biological Agents

Bacteria, viruses, parasites, mycosis (fungi), epithelia (animals), wood and vegetable fibers, photoallergens etc...

📡

Geopathies and Electrosmog

Natural and artificial radiation (Wi-Fi, mobile phones, high voltage lines) that alters the polarity of the blood etc...

🤧

Intolerances and Allergies

Sensitivities to wheat, milk and lactose, pollens and more than 1,000 testable substances etc...

🩹

Scars

Thick or fine scars that act as interference foci affecting distant organs etc...

腸

Intestinal and Nutritional Dysbiosis

Improvement of intestinal dysbiosis and correction of vitamin, mineral and amino acid deficiencies etc...

Detoxification: Recover the Natural Balance of Your Body

Detoxification is an essential natural process, but often overloaded by continuous exposure to environmental, food, chemical, and electromagnetic toxins. Our medical treatment is not a simple 'cleansing', but an advanced procedure that identifies and neutralizes the specific frequencies of toxic substances that interfere with the optimal functioning of your body. Restoring this balance is key to your overall health and vitality.

The Power of MORA Frequencies for Detoxification

Observe how harmonious frequencies (blue waves) interact and neutralize chaotic "toxins" (dark circles), restoring balance and energetic clarity. Vital "blood" particles (red) remain unaffected.

Toxins
Blood Cells
Neutralized Toxins
Frequency Waves

Your Detoxification Treatment: Simple and Effective

Just like our renowned stop-smoking treatment, the entire advanced medical detoxification process is carried out efficiently. We use state-of-the-art bio-frequency technology, a non-invasive and totally personalized method to address the specific needs detected in your body.

MORA Bio-resonance is a biophysical therapy that uses the patient's own electromagnetic oscillations. It does not introduce external energy, but "re-calibrates" cellular communication to activate self-healing.

📡

1. Reading

The MORA-Nova device reads the full spectrum of energetic frequencies of the body through high-conductivity electrodes.

→
🔬

2. Filtering

A biological filter separates harmonic (healthy) frequencies from inharmonic (pathological) ones caused by toxins and pathogens.

→
🔄

3. Neutralization

Pathological frequencies are inverted electronically (mirror image) and returned to the body to cancel out toxic information.

→
✨

4. Strengthening

Simultaneously, healthy frequencies are amplified and reintroduced, strengthening the body's self-regulation capacity.

Do you feel that your body needs a restart to function better? Free yourself from the accumulated toxic load and recover your vitality. Request your appointment for the bio-frequency detoxification treatment in La Herradura (Granada) or Bilbao and take the first step towards greater well-being.

Our Main Treatments

Homeopathic Medicine

Recover your health addressing the root of your diseases.

Stop Smoking Treatment

Quit smoking in a single session. Natural and effective with bio-frequencies.

Complete Detoxification

Free your body from toxics, bacterial and viral loads, vaccine side effects and persistent Covid.

Family Medicine

Children, allergies, asthma and digestive disorders such as intolerances, etc.

“Before curing anyone, ask him if he is willing to give up the things that made him sick.”

— Hippocrates

“Health depends on being in harmony with our souls.”

— Edward Bach

“Medicine must integrate body, soul and spirit so that the treatment is true and lasting.”

— Rudolf Steiner

“The true doctor not only prescribes, but listens, understands and guides towards balance.”

— Anonymous

“Homeopathy does not treat diseases, but people who are sick.”

— André Saine

“The body whispers before it screams; the attentive doctor listens to the silence of the disease before it manifests.”

— Proposed Quote

“Technology heals, chemistry acts, but the soul is cured in the presence of love and listening.”

— Proposed Quote

“The physician's high and only mission is to restore the sick to health, to cure, as it is termed.”

— Samuel Hahnemann

“The good physician treats the disease; the great physician treats the patient who has the disease.”

— William Osler
